title: A flight Controller observed and detected 5 UFOs near Guarulhos-SP [1987]
excerpt: DEC 13th, 1987. Time: 00:50 am. Duration: 10 minutes. A flight controller from Guarulhos Airport, State of São Paulo, observed with the naked eye and then checked on the radar “approximately 5 (five) small and close targets”. text_preview: DEC 13th, 1987. Time: 00:50 am. Duration: 10 minutes. A flight controller from Guarulhos Airport, State of São Paulo, observed with the naked eye and then checked on the radar “approximately 5 (five) small and close targets”. The military realized that “the position matched the visual observation”. According to the reporting witness, the UFOs “changed positions, but 2 (two) of them were seen at the end of lanes 09 and 27, respectively”. As for the location, the UFOs were in the “Southeast of Guarulhos, close to the BONSUCESSO position”. Visually, the UFOs had an “oval” shape, moved slowly and
summary: A Guarulhos airport flight controller visually observed and detected approximately 5 oval UFOs on radar near runway ends in the early hours of December 13, 1987.
